list:
Displays the completions that have been added
eg. {{$_psc.root_cmd}} list
search:
search completion
eg. {{$_psc.root_cmd}} search *    Show all
    {{$_psc.root_cmd}} search p*   Search for completion starting with p
    {{$_psc.root_cmd}} search *p*  Search for completion ending with p
update:
update something.
eg. {{$_psc.root_cmd}} update              => check available update
    {{$_psc.root_cmd}} update *            => update all
    {{$_psc.root_cmd}} update <completion> => update completions
alias:
Change the alias that triggers completion.
eg. {{$_psc.root_cmd}} alias <list|add|rm|reset> [...]
alias add:
add completion alias.
eg. {{$_psc.root_cmd}} add scoop sco
And you can use "sco" to trigger completion
alias rm:
rm completion alias
eg. {{$_psc.root_cmd}} rm sco
alias reset:
Remove all completion aliases
The alias of PSCompletions will change back to psc
config root_cmd: Get/Set PSCompletions alias, default to psc.
config language:
Get/Set language to en-US or zh-CN. 
It will affect all completion under this module
config github: Get/Set the address of github repo.
config gitee: Get/Set the address of gitee repo
config update:
Set whether to display remote update content.
1:Display updates
0:Disable display of updates
x.x.x:Module updates
which:
Locate completion storage location
eg. {{$_psc.root_cmd}} which scoop Return to the location of the Scoop completion file

PSCompletions_core_info.init_info:
✨✨✨PSCompletions({{$_psc.root_cmd}}) -- Init successfully!✨✨✨
(The following content is only displayed for the first time)
You just need to type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}}" and only "Tab", and you will quickly understand all commands.
Use "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} add <completion>" to add the first completion!
For more information, please visit the project:
    Github: https://github.com/abgox/PSCompletions
    Gitee: https://gitee.com/abgox/PSCompletions
PSCompletions_core_info.description:
PSCompletions({{$_psc.root_cmd}}) -- Command completion manager
For more information, please visit the following project
    Github: https://github.com/abgox/PSCompletions
    Gitee: https://gitee.com/abgox/PSCompletions
PSCompletions_core_info.module_update:
The powershell module(PSCompletions) can be updated now!Update?({{$_psc.version}} => {{$_psc.config.update}})
The added completion will be automatically migrated
PSCompletions_core_info.module_completed: PSCompletions module update completed.Please restart the terminal and re-import the module
PSCompletions_core_info.param_error:
Subcommand({{$arg[1]}}) error
It should be one of ({{$cmd_list -join ','}}).
PSCompletions_core_info.add_download_error:
Completion({{$completion}}) add failed
{{$completion}} completion's file({{$fail_file}}) download error,please check your network.
PSCompletions_core_info.update_download_error:
Completion({{$completion}}) update failed
{{$completion}} completion's file({{$fail_file}}) download error,please check your network.
PSCompletions_core_info.add_error:
Completion({{$_}}) isn't exist.
It's recommended to type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} add" and press "Tab" to complete.
Or type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} search" to search available completions.
PSCompletions_core_info.rm_error:
Remove completion({{$_}}) failed. You haven't added {{$_}} yet.
It's recommended to type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} rm" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.which_error:
Locate completion({{$_}}) failed. You haven't added {{$_}} yet.
It's recommended to type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} which" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.config_completed: {{$arg[1]}} => {{$arg[2]}} (If doesn't take effect, restart the terminal)
PSCompletions_core_info.update_tip: If you don't want to see it，please type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} config update 0"
PSCompletions_core_info.update_no: The added completions are all the latest!
PSCompletions_core_info.update_error:
Completion({{$_}}) update failed, You haven't added {{$_}} yet.
It's recommended to type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} update" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.cmd_error:
Subcommand({{$_psc.root_cmd}}) isn't exist.
It's recommended to type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}}" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.alias_tip:
You should type "alias" to trigger completion If exist alias.
eg. You should use {{$_psc.root_cmd}} to trigger completion instead of PSCompletions
PSCompletions_core_info.alias_add:
The completion trigger command has been changed from {{$arg[2]}} to {{$arg[3]}}.
Please restart the terminal to take effect.
PSCompletions_core_info.reset_confirm: Reset all completion aliases,are you sure?
PSCompletions_core_info.confirm: Press Enter to continue，or press any other key to abort
PSCompletions_core_info.config_error:
Config({{$arg[1]}}) no exist
It's recommended to type "{{$_psc.root_cmd}} config" and press "Tab" to complete.
